news.headline: Research report on Caterpillar's digital transformation strategies, tech initiatives, innovation programs. Manufacturer of construction, transportation, energy equipment.

Caterpillar Inc. is a renowned manufacturer specializing in construction, transportation, and energy equipment. It is involved in the design, manufacturing, marketing, and sale of construction and mining equipment. The report offers valuable insights into the company's tech landscape, highlighting key information for interested parties.

news.headline: Highlights from US job report: February data revealed 244,000 jobs added, with unemployment rate at 4%.
Frontier Airlines to operate from JFK Terminal 6 in 2026, part of a project by JMP at JFK Airport.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, JFK Millennium Partners (JMP) announced that they had been chosen by the Port Authority of New York & New Jersey to construct and manage Terminal 6 (T6) at John F. Kennedy International Airport. This new facility is expected to be a state-of-the-art development. Additionally, Frontier Airlines, listed on Nasdaq, is collaborating on this project. This partnership aims to enhance the airport's operations and services.

76% of Americans plan to celebrate St. Patrick's Day weekend; all ages participate in festivities.
news.summary: A recent national survey indicates that the upcoming St. Patrick's Day weekend in 2025 will be widely celebrated by 76% of Americans. The festive holiday, famous for its association with wearing green and enjoying traditional Irish cuisine, attracts an array of participants across all age groups. The survey findings highlight the enthusiastic engagement of people of all ages in the celebrations associated with St. Patrick's Day.

news.headline: Gevo projects significant Adjusted EBITDA growth in 2025, ending Q4 with $259.0 million in cash.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Gevo, Inc. highlighted their focus on achieving significant growth in Adjusted EBITDA in 2025. The company, known for developing affordable, sustainable hydrocarbon fuels and chemicals that lower greenhouse gas emissions, shared a business update. They reported closing the fourth quarter with $259.0 million in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash. Gevo, listed on NASDAQ as GEVO, emphasized their commitment to expanding their financial performance and advancing their renewable energy solutions without mentioning the specific source of the announcement.

(NYSE: VLRS and BMV: VOLAR), known as Volaris, a leading ultra-low-cost carrier operating in Mexico, the United States, Central, and South America, has released its preliminary traffic data for February 2025.

news.headline: FitLife Brands will report Q4 and full year fiscal 2024 financial performance on March 27, 2025. ($FTLF)
news.summary: FitLife Brands, Inc., based in Omaha, NE, revealed its intention to disclose the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2024 on March 27, 2025. The company, known for its nutritional supplements and wellness items, trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FTLF. This news was shared on March 07, 2025.

Inbank proposes amendments to its Articles of Association for approval at AGM on 31 March 2025.
news.summary: Inbank has put forward proposed changes to its Articles of Association for approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for March 31, 2025.

news.headline: Comedian TJ Miller embraces Bitcoin, discusses passion for BTC and cultural impact in interview with Cointelegraph.
news.summary: Comic TJ Miller recently expressed his full support for Bitcoin in an interview with Decentralize. He emphasized his enthusiasm for BTC and highlighted the significance of cultural acceptance in addition to financial involvement.

news.headline: Promising data for AVA6000 in Phase 1a & 1b, showing improved PFS in salivary gland cancer patients compared to standard treatments.
news.summary: Promising advancements were reported in the Progression Free Survival (PFS) rates among individuals with salivary gland cancers, showcasing favorable outcomes when contrasted with standard treatments. Notably, patients witnessed a significant increase in PFS duration, with figures pointing to a substantial improvement compared to traditional approaches. These findings suggest a marked enhancement in the management of salivary gland cancers and offer hope for improved outcomes in affected individuals.

news.headline: Dingdong sees 13.4% hike post Q4 earnings; revenue up by 18.3%, focusing on Shanghai, hinting at possible red in 2025.
news.summary: Dingdong (Cayman) Ltd. reported a fourth consecutive profit in the fourth quarter of last year, with a revenue increase of 18.3%, returning to annual growth in 2024 after a contraction in the previous year. The company is shifting focus to the affluent Yangtze Delta area, based in Shanghai. As competition in the online grocery sector intensifies, Dingdong plans to work more with partners and move away from its self-operated business model. The company's latest quarterly report hinted at a potential return to losses in the first quarter of 2025. Dingdong has been struggling to find a sustainable business model in China's competitive online grocery market, leading to a more strategic approach centered around Shanghai and the Yangtze Delta area. The company is also focusing on developing private label and seasonal products to differentiate itself and increase profit margins. Partnering with others will help lower capital costs and diversify Dingdong's business model.

news.headline: Ablation devices market to reach USD 14.8 billion by 2034, driven by innovations in RF, laser, and cryoablation.
news.summary: The ablation devices market is experiencing rapid growth, with a value of US$6.9 billion in 2023 and projected to reach US$14.8 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 7.3%. The demand for minimally invasive procedures and advancements in technologies like radiofrequency, microwave, and laser ablation are driving this growth. Increasing prevalence of cancer, cardiovascular diseases, and chronic pain conditions are also fueling adoption. Key players in the market include Medtronic, Abbott Laboratories, Boston Scientific Corporation, Johnson & Johnson, AngioDynamics, Smith & Nephew, AtriCure, EDAP TMS, Hologic, and Stryker Corporation. Significant developments in the market include Medtronic's FDA approval for its PulseSelect Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) System in December 2023 and Abbott's launch of the TactiFlex Ablation in May 2024. These advancements reflect a shift towards safer and more efficient treatment options in cardiology, oncology, dermatology, and gynecology applications.

news.headline: LyondellBasell CEO to speak at J.P. Morgan 2025 Industrials Conference on March 12, 2025, at 11:15 a.m. EDT.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 5, 2025, LyondellBasell revealed that their CEO, Peter Vanacker, is set to engage in a fireside discussion at the J.P. Morgan 2025 Industrials Conference in New York City. The session is scheduled for Wednesday, March 12, 2025, commencing at 11:15 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time.

news.headline: Mexico Economy Minister Ebrard: I think the auto sector is the area that is the most significant part of that group of companies that aren't compliant with USMCA.
Silexion Therapeutics reports positive data on SIL204 reducing tumors in pancreatic cancer models.
news.summary: The most recent data from Silexion Therapeutics shows that subcutaneous administration of SIL204 has been effective in reducing primary tumors and metastases in clinically significant orthotopic models. These models simulate the growth of human pancreatic cancer cells in their natural environment. The results indicate a promising impact on combating pancreatic cancer. This development could be a significant advancement in cancer treatment, with the potential to benefit a large number of patients.

news.headline: 2025 study by Provoke Insights and 3D Cloud reveals hybrid shopping as dominant path for furniture purchases, online-only rises, in-store-only declines.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in 2025 by Provoke Insights and 3D Cloud revealed a significant shift in shopping trends. Online-only shopping has seen a notable increase, while in-store-only purchases have been on the decline. The study specifically focused on the home furnishings category and highlighted that a majority of consumers now prefer a hybrid approach when making furniture purchases. This hybrid model has emerged as the most popular method for buying home furnishings, indicating a growing preference for a blend of online and in-store shopping experiences. The findings suggest that in the realm of furniture shopping, the future is increasingly shaped by a combination of digital and physical retail channels.

news.headline: First Quantum completes $1 billion Senior Notes offering.
Stephy Samaras appointed Director of Girls Lacrosse at The St. James. Leading Academy program. Two-time All-American.
news.summary: A renowned Hall of Fame player, Stephy Samaras, has been appointed as the Director of Girls Lacrosse and will now also supervise The St. James Academy lacrosse program in Springfield, Virginia. This news was confirmed on March 7, 2025. Samaras, a two-time All-American, brings a wealth of experience to this role.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures rise on tariff hints from Lutnick, despite Trump's support for tariffs.
news.summary: Futures experienced an increase following Commerce Secretary Lutnick's statement regarding possible rollback of tariffs on Canada and Mexico. President Trump, on the other hand, expressed support for tariffs during his address to Congress on Tuesday night. This caused a sense of uncertainty in the market despite Lutnick's optimistic remarks. The Dow Jones Futures responded positively to Lutnick's tariff hints, with the market showing signs of potential growth. Trump's declaration of 'Little Disturbance' accepted by the Presidency caused conflicting opinions within the market.

news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics will present at Leerink’s Global Healthcare Conference 2025 in Miami on March 10-12.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in San Diego, Capricor Therapeutics, a biotech firm traded as NASDAQ: CAPR, revealed that their management team will engage in individual investor meetings and present a company update at Leerink’s Global Healthcare Conference 2025 held in Miami, Florida from March 10-12, 2025. Capricor specializes in developing revolutionary cell and exosome-based treatments for rare diseases.

news.headline: Private employment rises by 77,000 in Feb, below forecast of 144,000. Hiring slowdown attributed to policy uncertainty and consumer spending.
news.summary: In February, private employers added 77,000 new jobs, marking the smallest increase in seven months and falling short of expectations of 140,000 new jobs. The ADP National Employment Report, released by Automatic Data Processing Inc., indicates a notable deceleration in hiring before the Bureau of Labor Statistics' upcoming non-farm payrolls report, anticipated to reveal the addition of 160,000 new jobs. ADP's chief economist, Nela Richardson, suggested that uncertainty in policy and a dip in consumer spending could have contributed to potential layoffs or a hiring slowdown during the previous month. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Economic Advisor Hassett: Measures will give the US the 3% or 4% growth we hope for.
Trump gives first speech to Congress since return to presidency, avoids mentioning fellow Republicans.
news.summary: During his recent address to a joint session of Congress, Donald Trump refrained from discussing his fellow Republicans, marking his first speech since resuming the presidency. The speech did not delve into the internal party matters, focusing on other key issues instead.

news.summary: During the White House Crypto Summit on March 7, Treasury Secretary Bessent indicated interest in procuring more Bitcoin.

The report delves into Starbucks' tech ventures, highlighting its digital transformation strategies, innovation schemes, and technology projects. Starbucks Corp, a renowned specialty coffee retailer, specializes in roasting, marketing, and selling specialty coffee. news.headline: Orkuveitan's 2024 financial statements show 45% profit growth to ISK 9.3 billion. It proposes ISK 6.5 billion dividend.
news.summary: Orkuveitan released its 2024 consolidated financial statements, revealing promising outcomes. The Group enjoyed a significant 45% profit surge from the previous year, reaching a total of ISK 9.3 billion. A dividend suggestion of ISK 6.5 billion has been tabled. The conglomerate consists of the primary firm, Veitur, along with Orka náttúrunnar, Ljósleiðarinn, and Carbfix. Its stakeholders include the City of Reykjavík, the Municipality of Akranes, and the Municipality of Borgarbyggð.

news.headline: European Commission approves Bristol Myers' Opdivo plus Yervoy for liver cancer patients. Results show improvement in overall survival.
news.summary: The European Commission recently approved Bristol Myers Squibb & Co’s Opdivo plus Yervoy for treating adult patients with unresectable or advanced hepatocellular carcinoma. The approval was granted based on data from the CheckMate -9DW study, which demonstrated a significant improvement in overall survival with this dual immunotherapy treatment. Notably, in the trial, 85% of patients received lenvatinib while 15% were given sorafenib. The study also revealed a median overall survival of 23.7 months. This development showcases a promising option for individuals battling liver cancer.

news.headline: US Economic Advisor Hassett: No uncertainty, there's going to be some tariff.
Mexico Economy Minister Ebrard: We believe around 85-90% of trade from Mexico to the US could be eligible to fall under USMCA requirements.
Enstar's subsidiary, Cavello Bay Reinsurance Limited, receives "A" Financial Strength Rating from AM Best, outlook stable.

The outlook for these Credit Ratings is stable.

Mexico's President Sheinbaum: If we don't put tariffs on what's coming from the US, the US won't put tariffs on what's coming from Mexico.
ILUMYA effective for nail psoriasis in study at 2025 AAD Conference. Significant improvement shown with no new safety signals.
news.summary: Research findings unveiled at the American Academy of Dermatology indicate substantial progress in addressing moderate-to-severe instances of nail psoriasis, with no reported safety concerns. The event, held in Princeton, N.J. on March 7, 2025, showcased data from Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, Inc., USA, which demonstrated marked enhancements in this condition. The study, presented by a subsidiary of Sun Pharmaceutical, revealed promising results in patients with moderate-to-severe nail psoriasis. This breakthrough highlights significant advancements in managing this dermatological issue, offering hope to many individuals grappling with this condition. The data underscores the potential for improved treatment options for those affected by nail psoriasis.

news.headline: Unit Corp (OTCQX: UNTC) to pay $1.25 dividend per share on March 28, 2025 to shareholders on record as of March 18.
news.summary: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) in Tulsa, Oklahoma, shared news of its upcoming quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for Q1 2025. Shareholders as of March 18, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 28, 2025. The company will use cash from its balance sheet to fund this payout. Known for its energy operations, Unit Corporation is a publicly-traded entity.

news.headline: Hassett: We will be reducing government employment and government spending.
Iran's Nour News affiliated with top security body: US Trump letter to Khamenei is a repetitive show by Washington.
Novartis shareholders approve all resolutions at 2025 AGM. 1,693 shareholders present, representing 57.42% of shares.

news.headline: XRP trading sideways after Bitcoin reserve news, price $2.54, market cap $147.3B. Bitcoin price at $90,125.54.
news.summary: XRP, the cryptocurrency, is currently experiencing a period of stability in trading as it remains unaffected by the strategic Bitcoin reserve executive order, which has not resulted in a significant market rally as of Friday. XRP is currently priced at $2.54 with a market capitalization of $147.3 billion. In the past 24 hours, it has seen a decrease of 2.7%, but over the last seven days, it has shown a positive trend with an increase of 22.8%. In comparison, Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $90,125.54, with a market cap of $1.78 trillion, experiencing a negligible 0.01% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 10.6% increase over the week. Ethereum (ETH) is trading at $2,214.08, with a market cap of $267.01 billion. Ethereum saw a 1.9% decline in the last 24 hours but a slight 2.9% increase in the last seven days. Onchain Lens data provider highlights a notable investor who accumulated 25.12 million XRP between April and November at an average price of $0.429.

news.headline: Egypt Data Center Market valued at USD 278 million in 2024, projected to reach USD 694 million by 2030 - growing at CAGR of 16.47%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Egypt Data Center Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was worth $278 million in 2024 and is estimated to grow to $694 million by 2030, with a CAGR of 16.47%. Egypt’s data center market is emerging in Africa, attracting rising investments in recent years. This expansion is being driven by various factors.

news.headline: Harris | Oakmark's Mike Manelli retiring after 20 years of service from the Oakmark International Fund and Oakmark International Small Cap Fund by year-end 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on March 7, 2025, it was announced that Mike Manelli, a Partner and co-portfolio manager for the Oakmark International Fund and the Oakmark International Small Cap Fund, will retire at the end of 2025 after 20 years of service. Manelli will be stepping down from his role as co-portfolio manager.
